response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills with TypeScript and cloud experience, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) at re:cinq. While his resume lacks explicit GenAI/AI-engineering experience (e.g., RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent systems), his technical breadth, leadership roles (Staff Engineer at re:cinq and Altom), and problem-solving track record suggest adaptability. The career gap raises a minor concern, but his recent AI-adjacent work and engineering depth justify an interview.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Python (implied), and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure experience (MCP, developer tooling) at re:cinq, showing relevant technical exposure
Proven leadership as a Staff Engineer and founder, with experience mentoring teams and driving technical excellence
concerns: No explicit GenAI experience (RAG, vector databases, or multi-agent systems) in career history despite job requirements
Career gap (Oct 2025–Present) with no clear explanation or recent work samples to assess current skills
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or stakeholder discovery sessions in GenAI contexts
